title: Ubiquiti UniFi Access Retrofit Hub
description: Notice: For this product, we provide individual project-based pricing depending on the configuration, scope, and conditions of the project. For more information, please contact your sales representative The Ubiquiti UniFi Access Retrofit Hub is designed to control up to 2 doors using existing cabling . It features (2) Wiegand/OSDP reader inputs , (2) relay outputs (configurable 12V/1A, 24V/0.5A, or dry), (2) 10/100Mbps ports, digital inputs for connecting (2) exit buttons and (2) door position sensors and (1) emergency input and output . Power is supplied via a 12-24V DC terminal block with the option to connect a backup battery using the UACC-Retrofit-PSU-12V Device DIN rail Wall plugs and screws
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (2) 10/100Mbps Power Power type DC terminal Max. power consumption [W] 50 Power via connector/terminal 12 .. 24V DC
